gold_change_reason: Added preprocessing of input string to remove whitespace and blank lines, ensuring robust parsing as required by the D-axis operator.
covered_requirements: Increase data complexity by introducing whitespace, blank lines, and mixed line endings in the m/z input string to test parsing robustness.
Scaled executable cases must expose the new requirement introduced by this operator.
implementation_notes: The _get_num_matches function now splits the input string into lines, strips whitespace from each line, filters out empty lines, and rejoins them with newline before sending to the API.
assumptions: The API expects a plain text file with one m/z value per line after whitespace removal.
